turns.user: Tìm tin tức mới nhất về GPT-5 trên Twitter
turns.assistant_text:
Here are the latest tweets about GPT-5:

1. **@letti1109**: "Surely chat gpt knows more.🤡🤡🤡🤡🤡 I don't know who is the bigger idiot. Cornacardi who comes up with such ridiculous lies. Or her 5 fans who believe her. You've been in hysteria and panic for two weeks. There's a reason, right?🤣🤣🤣🤣The horns are coming, stupid bitch." [View Tweet](https://x.com/letti1109/status/2061734250102043032)

2. **@helloniania**: "Opus4.8はGPT-5.~系より重篤なアスペルガーになっている。勝手に用語を新設して説明なしに使ったりする。こちら側が持っている情報を想像できない。" [View Tweet](https://x.com/helloniania/status/2061733655857558014)

3. **@AgathaAkullu**: "When you tell Chat GPT, 'explain for me like I’m a 5 yr old' 😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂" [View Tweet](https://x.com/AgathaAkullu/status/2061733281431761359)

4. **@tulexaicom**: "The avatar landing page I just shipped: [link](https://t.co/qkbsTtx6wi) HeyGen / Synthesia alternative for $11/mo (vs $22-29 for them alone). Comes bundled with GPT-5, Claude, DALL·E and Sora in the same subscription. Tried it? Would love feedback - what is missing, what feels off." [View Tweet](https://x.com/tulexaicom/status/2061730717017448520)

5. **@BKrabel59745**: "@CliffMaffe7530 🏝️ CHAT GPT PLUS  30 DAY  หาร 4  120 Bath. 30 DAY หาร 5 100 Bath. สั่งซื้อแอดไลน์ : @961vnegl ☃️ รับเคลม ดูแลตลอดการใช้งาน #หารแชทgpt #หารchatgpt #หารแชทจีพีที #chatgptplus 🍀🐸" [View Tweet](https://x.com/BKrabel59745/status/2061730381800644707)

Let me know if you need anything else!
